Solar capture — value at risk analysis

Figure 1
Daily capture ratio — distribution
Histogram of daily capture ratios. P10 = worst 10% of days. The left tail is the developer's risk exposure.
Figure 2
Daily capture ratio — time series
Each bar is one day. P10 and P90 reference lines show the range of outcomes.
Figure 3
Bad day vs good day anatomy — hourly profile
Average hourly price on P10 (worst) days vs P90 (best) days. Shows why bad days are bad: higher solar output pushing prices deeper negative during the same peak hours.
P10 days — avg price P90 days — avg price P10 solar gen P90 solar gen
Figure 4
Threshold exceedance — days below key capture ratio levels
How often did solar assets earn less than key thresholds? Critical for PPA pricing and project finance stress tests.
